title: polygala obversa
intro: Polygala obversa, also known as Chinese polygala, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including kidney disease, insomnia, and fatigue, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala obversa include improving kidney function, enhancing cognitive function, and promoting relaxation and sleep. In herbal preparations, Polygala obversa is often combined with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and is available in the form of teas, capsules, and tinctures.
